chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-311 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.1547/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2025 Ms. Wajeeha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 12.08.2022, which is almost three years ago, none was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. Despite this being an old matter, it has not been pursued diligently on behalf of the petitioner. Once again, the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
